system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content:
Hi there! Um, I just got my order and, okay, so the hiking boots—I think someone already wore them? They look kinda scuffed and there’s dirt on the soles. I’m not super happy about it, honestly. Is there any way I can get a fresh pair? Same specs, please. Oh, and I also got a jigsaw puzzle, but I realized I want a more, like, fancy theme? And maybe 500 pieces less, but I want it to still be tricky, you know? 

Oh, I’m Yara Ito, zip code 75284. Sorry, I can never remember my email, but I hope that’s enough!

Thank you for providing your name and zip code. I’ll need to verify your account before proceeding. Could you please confirm your full name is "Yara Ito" and your zip code is "75284"? Once confirmed, I’ll look up your account and help you with exchanging the hiking boots and finding a new jigsaw puzzle option.

Yes, that's right! My full name is Yara Ito and my zip code is 75284. 

Thanks for helping me out—I'm really hoping we can sort this out because the boots are just... ew, and I want a puzzle that looks a bit cooler!

I'm having trouble accessing your account with the information provided. To assist you further, could you please provide your email address? This will help me locate your account and proceed with your requests for the hiking boots and jigsaw puzzle. Thank you for your patience!

Oh gosh, I’m so sorry—I honestly can’t remember which email I used for this order. I have like, a million emails and I always mix them up! Is there any other way you can find my account? Maybe with my phone number or order number? Or maybe my shipping address? I just really want to get these boots sorted and swap the puzzle!

At this time, I can only locate your account using your full name and zip code or your email address. Unfortunately, I’m unable to search by phone number, order number, or shipping address.

If you’re able to find or remember the email you used, even just to check your order confirmation, I can use that to help you right away. Otherwise, I recommend reaching out to a human agent who may have more options for verifying your identity.

Would you like me to transfer you to a human agent for further assistance?

Oh, that’s a bummer! I really wish I could remember the email, but my inbox is a mess and I can’t find the confirmation right now. Yeah, could you please transfer me to a human agent? Maybe they can help me out with more ways to verify. I just really want to get those boots exchanged and find a cooler puzzle. Thank you so much for trying!

arguments.summary: User Yara Ito (zip 75284) wants to exchange hiking boots (delivered in used condition) for a new pair of the same specs and swap a jigsaw puzzle for a different theme and piece count. User cannot recall the email used and cannot be authenticated via available methods. Needs alternative verification options.

messages.content:
Thank you for your understanding and patience. I will transfer you to a human agent who can assist you further and may be able to verify your identity using other methods. 

YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.
